positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic depiction of a celestial guardian. The central subject is a majestic, stylized lion head combined with cosmic elements: a subtle nebula background filling the halo area, and constellations etched into its mane. The lion should be rendered in high-contrast black linework and deep midnight blues, giving it an ethereal yet powerful presence. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, designed for maximum impact on fabric. Use negative space dramatically to enhance the silhouette. Style: Neo-tribal mixed with celestial art, highly vectorized, suitable for screen printing. Lighting: Dramatic, back-lit, with star-glow highlights. Color palette: Deep indigo, cosmic violet, brilliant white, and matte black. Clean edges, bold lines, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor quality, cartoon, photorealistic, 3d render, bokeh
